general_provisions: This bill creates the Firefighter Cancer Benefit Trust Fund.
hilighted_provisions: This bill:<hr><ltbullet>defines terms;<hr><ltbullet>changes the amount of revenue transferred to the Utah State Retirement Office from the insurance premiums tax and used to pay for certain firefighter retirement programs;<hr><ltbullet>creates the Firefighter Cancer Benefit Trust Fund;<hr><ltbullet>creates a board of trustees; and<hr><ltbullet>establishes the duties of the board of trustees.
